preflight_disposition: Revision 2 completed the full extraction but failed its preregistered compact-geometry gate, so it produced no rankings or human pack. Its cache is discarded. Revision 3 relaxes only catalog-geometry retention thresholds, still without any MTAT TEST or commercial human label, and starts a new 272,853-row build from empty storage after this file is signed.

hypothesis.motivation: Frozen CLAP cosine was the strongest fixed development comparator in the MTAT v12 OOF artifact.
hypothesis.decision_use: MTAT motivates this hypothesis only and cannot select or promote a commercial catalog ranker.
hypothesis.pretraining_caveat: LAION-CLAP pretraining may overlap MagnaTagATune; the MTAT result may therefore reflect prior exposure and is not clean deciding evidence.

catalog.alignment: output row i must retain source track_ids[i]; duplicate or reordered IDs fail closed

audio_preprocessing.source: fresh Deezer public 30-second previews resolved from each stable track ID
audio_preprocessing.signed_url_policy: resolve immediately before download; never persist a signed URL
audio_preprocessing.decode: mono float32 resampled to 48000 Hz with librosa
audio_preprocessing.windows: three deterministic 10-second windows: start, centered, and end; repeat-pad clips shorter than 10 seconds
audio_preprocessing.pooling: L2-normalize each 512-D window, arithmetic mean, then L2-normalize
audio_preprocessing.retention: temporary audio is deleted after decode/embed; only embeddings, status, and checksums remain in gitignored ml_data
audio_preprocessing.resumption: SQLite row status plus aligned float16 memmap; available rows require a nonzero finite embedding checksum

compression.selection_sample: independent deterministic unlabeled catalog sample: 256 queries and 20000 references, disjoint from no fitting sample because JL is data-independent
compression.selection_rule: choose the smallest dimension meeting every geometry gate; if none passes, fail closed
compression.row_normalization: L2 after projection and again after float16 reload

shared_ranking_controls.quality_filter: TitleQualityFilter query-aware eligibility and canonical-version preference
shared_ranking_controls.same_artist: exclude every normalized credited seed artist; maximum one track per normalized candidate artist
shared_ranking_controls.mmr: greedy 0.85 * relevance01 - 0.15 * maximum selected compact-CLAP cosine01

pure_clap.candidates: catalog-wide compact CLAP cosine top 500 before shared controls

graph_clap_union.candidates: union of compact CLAP top 200 and tracks from Last.fm/Music4All top-96 artist neighborhoods

conservative_clap_fallback.lastfm_confidence: mean of the five strongest nonnegative Last.fm weights divided by query maximum
conservative_clap_fallback.gate: lastfm_confidence >= 0.55 and at least five controlled candidates have clap_cosine01 >= 0.65
conservative_clap_fallback.fallback: exact current production top five if the gate does not fire

diagnostics_only: known category-A target candidate recall at 50 and 200
proxy_safety.selection_rule: choose the first variant in selection_order that passes every hard gate; do not inspect commercial human labels

human_pack_gate.comparison: current production baseline versus the proxy-safe selected CLAP challenger
human_pack_gate.assignment: per-session randomized seed, list, and display order
human_pack_gate.rating_scale: MIREX three-class similarity plus optional integer 0-10, list coherence, unrelated top-3 count, and junk/version flag
human_pack_gate.preview: stable Deezer IDs with fresh on-demand URL resolution; no signed URL persisted
human_pack_gate.promotion: blocked until actual signed human ratings independently satisfy immutable goal AC#3

resource_gates.vercel_project_specific_limit: unknown unless authenticated linked-project evidence becomes available
